message:
fix(daemon): increase scanner buffer to 1MB for large JSONL lines (bd-21)

bufio.Scanner defaults to 64KB max token size. Issues with descriptions
exceeding 64KB cause ErrTooLong, aborting the entire import. Call
scanner.Buffer() with a 1MB limit to handle large JSONL lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/flint
Rig: beads
Role: polecats

files.patch:
@@ -217,6 +217,10 @@ func importToJSONLWithStore(ctx context.Context, store storage.Storage, jsonlPat
 	// Parse all issues
 	var issues []*types.Issue
 	scanner := bufio.NewScanner(file)
+	// Increase scanner buffer to handle large JSONL lines (e.g., issues with
+	// descriptions exceeding the default 64KB limit).
+	const maxScannerBuffer = 1024 * 1024 // 1MB
+	scanner.Buffer(make([]byte, 0, maxScannerBuffer), maxScannerBuffer)
 	lineNum := 0
 
 	for scanner.Scan() {
